$comment: Named Foundry server profiles for the MCP server. Copy to foundry-servers.json (next to the server, or point FOUNDRY_SERVERS_CONFIG at it). Each profile needs a unique port; the module's connection settings in each Foundry world must point at that profile's port. WebRTC signaling uses port + 1. Unset fields inherit from environment variables (FOUNDRY_HOST, FOUNDRY_PORT, ...).
